# Can I Use: Parquet Format Support Matrix

A comprehensive compatibility reference for Apache Parquet features across libraries and query engines.
**This matrix is auto-generated by running actual tests against each library.**

> **Legend:** ✅ = Supported (with version introduced when known) | ❌ = Not supported | ➖ = Not tested / unavailable

---

## Tools & Versions Tested

| Tool | Version | Language |
|---|---|---|
| PyArrow | 23.0.1 | Python |
| fastparquet | 2025.12.0 | Python |
| Polars | 1.38.1 | Rust / Python |
| DuckDB | 1.4.4 | C++ |
| parquet-rs | 55.2.0 | Rust |
| parquet-go | 0.24.0 | Go |
| parquet-java | parquet-mr version 1.15.0 (build 4665401d36e468c988322f78621da7c2d1c22ede) | Java |
| parquet-dotnet | 5.0.0.0 | C# / .NET |

---

## Encoding Types × Data Types

Each encoding is tested with each physical data type to show which combinations are supported.

|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|

| BINARY | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |

---

## How to Reproduce

Each result is generated by running a small CLI program that tests actual Parquet read/write operations.

```bash
# Install Python dependencies
pip install pyarrow fastparquet polars duckdb pandas

# Run the matrix generator
cd parquet_can_i_use
python generate_matrix.py
```

Individual CLIs can be run separately:

```bash
# Python libraries
python cli/python/test_pyarrow.py
python cli/python/test_fastparquet.py
python cli/python/test_polars.py
python cli/python/test_duckdb.py

# Rust
cd cli/rust/test_parquet_rs && cargo run --release

# Go
cd cli/go/test_parquet_go && go run .

# Java
cd cli/java/test_parquet_java && mvn package -q && java -jar target/test-parquet-java-1.0-SNAPSHOT.jar

# .NET
cd cli/dotnet/test_parquet_dotnet && dotnet run
```

Each CLI outputs a JSON report that is saved in `parquet_can_i_use/results/`.

- [DuckDB Parquet Documentation](https://duckdb.org/docs/data/parquet/overview)
- [Polars Parquet Documentation](https://docs.pola.rs/user-guide/io/parquet/)
- [parquet-rs (arrow-rs) Documentation](https://docs.rs/parquet/latest/parquet/)
- [parquet-dotnet Documentation](https://github.com/aloneguid/parquet-dotnet)
- [fastparquet Documentation](https://fastparquet.readthedocs.io/)
- [parquet-go Documentation](https://github.com/parquet-go/parquet-go)

*Auto-generated by `generate_matrix.py`. Re-run to update with latest library versions.*
